{{Quote|But that is his ship. And where the ''Hawk-Bat'' ventures, Cohl is not far behind!|[[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] communications technician to [[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Daultay Dofine]]|<ref name="Cloak of Deception">''[[Cloak of Deception]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Hawk-Bat''''' was a jet-black [[Tempest-class gunship|''Tempest''-class gunship]] famous for being the personal ship of [[Arwen Cohl]], and recognized as such on sight by many lowlifes throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It led the [[Dorvalla Incident|attack]] on the ''[[Revenue]]'' over [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].

It was later commandeered by [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] on [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]], where he used it to travel to [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]].
